name: MOON KNIGHT
description: As the avatar of the Egyptian God of Vengeance, Marc Spector's body has been enhanced by Khonshu himself. Bathed in a luminous aura that pierces the darkness, Moon Knight glides through the night, ready to sear his enemies with his master's sacred Ankhs.
lore: Mercenary Marc Spector was given a second chance at life when he became the avatar of the Egyptian moon god, Khonshu. As Moon Knight, he doles out righteous vengeance, locked in a never-ending battle with both the criminals on the streets and the voices in his head. At Khonshu's behest, Marc doles out righteous vengeance against those from across all timelines that challenge his master, putting him at odds with everyone from the mystic evils of Doctor Doom to the unknowable, alien darkness that threatens mortals and gods alike.

abilities.name: Crescent Dart
abilities.description: Unleash Crescent Darts forward that can bounce between enemies and Ankhs, dealing damage to enemies

stats.Casting: Triple shot that fires in a straight trajectory
stats.Fire Rate: The firing interval between shots is 0.05s, with an interval of 0.57s between each round of shooting
stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 30m, decreasing to 50% at 50m

abilities.name: Hand of Khonshu
abilities.description: Open a portal that allows Khonshu to bombard enemies with his talons

abilities.name: Ancient Ankh
abilities.description: Fire an Ankh to launch up enemies within its radius towards the center

stats.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact

abilities.name: Moonlight Hook
abilities.description: Launch a frontal grappling hook that pulls Moon Knight towards it

abilities.name: Moon Blade
abilities.description: Launch forward a Moon Blade that can bounce between enemies and Ankhs, dealing damage to enemies

stats.Casting: Projectile that fires in a straight trajectory
stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 30m, decreasing to 50% at 50m
stats.Bonus Health: 25, up to a max of 76 Bonus Health

abilities.name: Triple Eclipse
abilities.description: Perform a combo with his truncheon, and the third strike will launch up the enemy hit slightly

received.name: MOON GOD'S CHOSEN
received.description: Blessed by Khonshu, Blade gains a new ability. When activated, Blade swings his Ancestral Sword in a powerful slash, dashing forward a short distance. At the end of the dash, he swiftly slashes four times, each strike sending a Darkmoon Blade forward. When a Darkmoon Blade hits an enemy, it bounces to nearby targets

base.description: Enter Phased state and dash forward. Upon concluding, emit a Light Energy Healing Wave that heals Moon Knight and nearby allies.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Cloak & Dagger, the Phased state duration is extended, the dash distance increases, and the Light Energy Healing Wave boasts a larger radius and stronger healing output.

base.description: Deploy an Ankh Trap. Upon triggering, an Ankh materializes at the location, while summoning a single Talon of Khonshu to Launch enemies toward the trap's center.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Elsa Bloodstone, triggering the trap summons multiple Talons of Khonshu to bombard the area.
